title: RustBox native configuration v1

schema_version.description: Native configuration language version. It must match the schema contract.

inbounds.description: Traffic entry points exposed by this RustBox instance.

outbounds.description: Route-addressable direct, proxy, and group exits.

endpoints.description:
Bidirectional network endpoints. They are lowered into the same
route-addressable runtime graph as outbounds; keeping the distinction
in the document avoids duplicating compiler and data-plane machinery.

dns.description: Optional DNS resolver, cache, FakeIP, and hijack policy.

rule_sets.description: Inline, local, or remotely refreshed route rule sets.

routes.description: Ordered routing actions followed by a required terminal default.

level.description: Minimum retained and emitted level: trace, debug, info, warn, error, or off.

file.description: Log file path required by file-based output modes.

platform.description: Whether platform-native logging should be enabled by an embedding host.

InboundConfig.description: inbound 的源配置，描述用户想暴露的入口类型和监听地址。

id.description: Stable logical identifier used by routing and observability.

oneOf.description: mixed 入口，在同一 TCP 监听地址上接受 HTTP 代理和 SOCKS5。
HTTP 代理入口，监听本地 TCP 地址并支持 CONNECT 和普通 absolute-form 请求。
SOCKS5 入口，监听本地 TCP 地址并支持 CONNECT/UDP ASSOCIATE。
AnyTLS 服务端入口，同时支持普通 TCP 流与 UOT datagram mode。

TUN packet-device inbound. The packet-to-flow stack is composed by the
runtime/platform layer, not by the config model.

auto_detect_interface.description:
Bind client-originated sockets to the physical default interface so a
full-tunnel route cannot capture RustBox's own outbound traffic.

oneOf.description: Transparent TCP redirect/TPROXY/WFP inbound using platform original-dst.

Network.description: RustBox 数据面当前处理的网络类别。

OutboundConfig.description: outbound 的源配置，描述可被路由引用的出站能力。

id.description: Stable logical identifier referenced by routes and outbound groups.

dial.description: Socket and detour policy applied before the outbound protocol connects.

oneOf.description: 直连出站，对应 sing-box `direct` outbound。

阻断出站，对应 sing-box `block` outbound。

当前路由编译器会把指向该 ID 的默认路由转成 `Reject(Policy)`，
避免数据面为“阻断”创建无意义的上游连接。
SOCKS5 上游代理，对应 sing-box `socks` outbound 的基础字段。

server.description: SOCKS5 代理服务器地址和端口。

username.description: SOCKS5 用户名；设置时必须同时设置 `password`。

password.description: SOCKS5 密码；设置时必须同时设置 `username`。

oneOf.description: HTTP CONNECT 上游代理，对应 sing-box `http` outbound 的基础字段。

server.description: HTTP 代理服务器地址和端口。

username.description: HTTP 代理认证用户名；设置时必须同时设置 `password`。

password.description: HTTP 代理认证密码；设置时必须同时设置 `username`。

oneOf.description: Shadowsocks 上游代理，对应 sing-box `shadowsocks` outbound 的基础字段。

server.description: Shadowsocks 服务器地址和端口。

method.description: Shadowsocks 加密方法名称，例如 `aes-128-gcm`。

password.description: Shadowsocks 密码；部分 2022 方法要求这里是 base64 密钥材料。

oneOf.description: 手动出站组，对应 sing-box `selector` outbound 的基础字段。

outbounds.description: 可被选择的子出站逻辑 ID。

default.description: 初始选择；未设置时使用 `outbounds` 第一项。

cache_path.description: 可选选择状态文件；成功切换后持久化，启动时恢复。

oneOf.description: 延迟测试出站组，对应 sing-box `urltest` outbound 的基础字段。

outbounds.description: 可参与测试的子出站逻辑 ID。

timeout_seconds.description: 单个探测的总超时秒数。

concurrency.description: 同一组最多并发探测数。

failure_threshold.description: 连续失败达到该值后立即从候选中摘除。

cache_path.description: 可选自动选择状态文件。

interrupt_exist_connections.description: 选择改变时是否中断已有连接（当前平台需支持会话中断）。

oneOf.description: VMess AEAD 上游代理。
VLESS 上游代理；当前数据面支持普通 TCP 模式。
Trojan TLS 上游代理。
Hysteria2 QUIC outbound with TCP streams and native UDP relay.
NaiveProxy over a multiplexed HTTP/2 CONNECT session.
TUIC v5 over a shared authenticated QUIC connection.
Userspace WireGuard endpoint exposed to the route graph as an outbound.

ShadowTLS v3 camouflage transport. Other protocol outbounds can use it
through `dial.detour`.
AnyTLS 上游代理；组合根通过 `rustbox-outbound-anytls` 实例化数据面。

detour.description: Optional outbound ID through which this outbound establishes its connection.

bind_interface.description: Physical or logical interface name used for socket binding.

routing_mark.description: Platform routing mark applied to outbound sockets when supported.

connect_timeout.description: Maximum time allowed to establish an outbound connection.

tcp_keep_alive.description: Idle duration before TCP keepalive starts.

domain_resolver.description: DNS server ID used to resolve this outbound's server domain.

client_certificate_pem.description: PEM encoded client certificate chain for mutual TLS.

client_private_key_pem.description: PEM encoded client private key for mutual TLS.

certificate_public_key_sha256.description: Base64 encoded SHA-256 hashes of leaf certificate SubjectPublicKeyInfo.

public_key.description: URL-safe base64 encoded X25519 public key.

short_id.description: Hex encoded short id (at most eight bytes; right padded with zeroes).

rules.description: Ordered DNS routing and action rules.

final_server.description: Server ID used when no DNS rule selects another action.

cache.description: Bounded positive and negative DNS cache policy.

fake_ip.description: Optional synthetic address allocation and persistence.

hijack.description: DNS destinations captured directly by a TUN inbound.

id.description: Stable server identifier referenced by DNS rules and final_server.

outbound.description: Optional outbound ID used to reach this upstream.

oneOf.description: An RR type not yet assigned a named configuration spelling.

NetworkType.description: Platform network classification captured before routing.

description: Structural contract shared by RustBox native TOML and JSON configuration files.
$comment: Generated from Rust deserialization types; do not edit this file manually.
